task_completion.description: Subsurface application is opened to view the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface main application window is visible on the screen, displaying a list of dives.

task_completion.description: The dive associated with the misspelled site 'Yelow House' is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dive with the location 'Yelow House' is selected in the dive list, or 'Yelow House' is visible and selected in the dive site management window.

task_completion.description: The misspelled site name is changed to the correct 'Yellow House'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location input field in the dive notes/details panel is being edited to 'Yellow House', or a merge/edit dialog is open showing 'Yelow House' being changed to 'Yellow House'.

task_completion.description: The dive site is successfully consolidated with no duplicates remaining.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive list or dive details now show 'Yellow House' for the affected dive, and 'Yelow House' is no longer visible in the dive list, site list, or location dropdown.

task_completion.description: The dive log is saved after the consolidation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File' menu is open with 'Save' highlighted, a save confirmation is visible, or the window title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (such as an asterisk '*' next to the filename) after the changes were made.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Subsurface graphical user interface to consolidate the dive sites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made within the Subsurface application window, not via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the underlying XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (e.g., nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) are open showing the dive log's XML source code.

integrity.description: The save action was performed through the Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is evident in the Subsurface GUI (e.g., clicking File -> Save, or the application's unsaved indicator disappearing), rather than a terminal script modifying the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct dive site name is 'Yellow House'. The misspelled site that needs to be consolidated is 'Yelow House'. The VLM should verify that the location for the affected dive is changed to 'Yellow House' and that 'Yelow House' no longer exists as a distinct entity in the application.
